blocks.content: Eli called Kit at eight AM Pacific time, which meant he had been sitting on it since at least midnight.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: I already knew she was going to say yes. I need you to know I knew.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: You've always known everything five minutes before it happens.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: I have good instincts. Kit. We're engaged.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: I mean you and Daisy. Obviously. But also — I was in that field at midnight in October. I am emotionally invested.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: I had something in both eyes simultaneously. Different thing.
Kit laughed. On his end of the line, he heard Eli go quiet in the way he only did when something real was happening underneath.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: I'm happy for you, man. Both of you. You did this right.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Still have to actually get married.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: How did you know. Not that it was her — I've known that since ninth grade. How did you know you were ready to ask.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I stopped waiting to feel ready. I decided to be ready. There's a difference.
Eli was quiet for a long moment.
